servers.name: Weather MCP
servers.description: Real weather data from NOAA and Open-Meteo. 6 tools, no API key required.
servers.agentNotes: Current conditions and alerts come from NOAA and only cover the USA. get_forecast uses Open-Meteo and works worldwide. For current weather outside the USA, prefer get_forecast here or the open-meteo-remote server.

servers.name: Open-Meteo (Remote HTTP)
servers.description: Public hosted Open-Meteo MCP instance over Streamable HTTP - demonstrates the remote transport.
servers.agentNotes: Global coverage for any location worldwide. Use openmeteo_get_forecast for current weather and forecasts anywhere - geocode first to get coordinates.

servers.name: Amadeus Flights MCP
servers.description: Flight search via the Amadeus test API. Requires AMADEUS_CLIENT_ID and AMADEUS_CLIENT_SECRET in backend/.env (free at developers.amadeus.com). Phase 4.
servers.agentNotes: Test environment only - limited airlines and routes, prices are not live market fares.
